field.title: Field
field.description: The internal name of this attribute, used in the database and code (camelCase)

header.title: Header
header.description: The human-readable label shown in the UI for this field

inList.title: In List
inList.description: Whether this field should appear in list views or tables in the UI

inDetail.title: In Detail
inDetail.description: Whether this field should appear on detailed entity view pages

displayType.title: Display Type
displayType.description: How the field should be displayed or edited in the UI

validation.title: Validation Rule
validation.description: A regex pattern used to validate user input for this field

options.title: Options
options.description: Comma-separated list of options, required if displayType is 'dropdown' or 'multiselect'
